## Tester Info

- **Tester Name / ID**:
- **Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
- **App Version**: (e.g., 0.1.0)
- **Time Spent Testing**: (approximate hours)

## Feedback Category

- [ ] Usability / UX
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Feature request
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] General impression

## Summary

_Brief description of your feedback._

## Details

_Expand on your feedback. Be as specific as possible._

## Suggestions

_Any concrete suggestions for improvement._

## What Worked Well

_Features or aspects you found positive or useful._

## What Didn't Work Well

_Pain points, confusing workflows, or frustrations._

## Would You Use This App?

- [ ] Yes, regularly
- [ ] Yes, occasionally
- [ ] Maybe, with improvements
- [ ] No

## Additional Context

_Screenshots, comparisons, or any other relevant information._
